one_time_description: Member distributions included in Administration expenditures totalling $7,371,041 (2023: $965,000) — large non-recurring distribution to members
economic_notes: Three government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership (99% owned), PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation (100%), and 1247835 B.C. Ltd (100%). GBEs focus on own source revenue contracts and economic development. PFN 3 Feathers Development LP reported net income of $23,597,549 for year ended December 31, 2023. First Nation also holds BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP unit.
notes: 1) Three GBEs use modified equity method with December 31 year-end creating a 3-month lag. Earnings from GBEs of $23,591,957 dominate revenue. 2) Massive member distributions of $7,371,041 in Administration vs $965,000 prior year — significant one-time-like item. 3) Accumulated surplus jumped from $32.7M to $50.1M largely due to GBE equity growth ($16.3M to $37.8M). 4) No schedule of remuneration for Chief/Council/staff provided. 5) ISC management review letter for fiscal 2020 under appeal — potential contingent liability unrecorded. 6) First Nation in violation of FNFTA submission deadline as audit report dated May 14, 2025. 7) total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($1,519,179) + FNHA ($253,143) + FNESC ($115,887) + Province of BC ($633,441) + other government from segment ($553,054 implied) — used statement of operations lines: ISC + FNHA + FNESC + BC = $2,521,650; other government per segment schedule = $1,555,525 but overlaps; used ISC+FNHA+FNESC+BC = $2,521,650 plus remaining other government not captured = segment other government $1,555,525 net of FNHA+FNESC+BC already counted. Re-calculated: total_government_transfers = ISC $1,519,179 + FNHA $253,143 + FNESC $115,887 + BC $633,441 = $2,521,650; osr = $29,949,725 - $2,521,650 = $27,428,075. Adjusted values: total_government_transfers=2521650, osr=27428075. 8) Funds held in trust $1,356,413 classified as restricted_cash equivalent.
